title: Oulu Heavy Rain
lead: Oulu is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.86. This anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Oulu are characterized by heavy rain, with an umidita of 96% and vento of 5.8 km/h.
 The HDD value is 14.5 GG, while the CDD value is 0.0 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating demands.
 The Level: CRITICAL classification suggests that immediate attention is required to mitigate the effects of this weather event.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
